SEARCH
Package Interface

Class MapCanvas

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.canvas.Canvas
Interface.MapCanvas
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class MapCanvas extends javafx.scene.canvas.Canvas
JavaFX Canvas responsible for drawing the Voronoi diagram, Delaunay triangulation, hospitals and users.

  • Constructor Details

    • MapCanvas

      public MapCanvas(double width, double height, VoronoiEngine engine)
      Constructs the MapCanvas.
      Parameters:
      width - initial canvas width
      height - initial canvas height
      engine - the Voronoi engine

  • Method Details

    • setEngine

      public void setEngine(VoronoiEngine engine)
      Sets the engine (used when importing a map).
      Parameters:
      engine - the new engine

    • setSelectedHospital

      public void setSelectedHospital(Hospital h)
      Sets the currently selected hospital (highlighted with halo).
      Parameters:
      h - the selected hospital, or null to clear

    • setShowDelaunay

      public void setShowDelaunay(boolean show)
      Sets whether the Delaunay triangulation is shown.
      Parameters:
      show - true to show

    • setShowZones

      public void setShowZones(boolean show)
      Sets whether the Voronoi zones are shown.
      Parameters:
      show - true to show

    • setShowLinks

      public void setShowLinks(boolean show)
      Sets whether the user-to-hospital links are shown.
      Parameters:
      show - true to show

    • setScale

      public void setScale(double scale)
      Sets the zoom scale.
      Parameters:
      scale - the new scale

    • addOffset

      public void addOffset(double dx, double dy)
      Adds an offset to the view (pan).
      Parameters:
      dx - horizontal offset
      dy - vertical offset

    • toScreenX

      public double toScreenX(double wx)
      Converts world X coordinate to screen X.
      Parameters:
      wx - world x
      Returns:
      screen x

    • toScreenY

      public double toScreenY(double wy)
      Converts world Y coordinate to screen Y.
      Parameters:
      wy - world y
      Returns:
      screen y

    • toWorldX

      public double toWorldX(double sx)
      Converts screen X coordinate to world X.
      Parameters:
      sx - screen x
      Returns:
      world x

    • toWorldY

      public double toWorldY(double sy)
      Converts screen Y coordinate to world Y.
      Parameters:
      sy - screen y
      Returns:
      world y

    • redraw

      public void redraw()
      Redraws the entire canvas. Called every time the map changes.

    • setSelectedUser

      public void setSelectedUser(User u)
      set the selected user
      Parameters:
      u - user
